logo_suite: Primary lockup: Refined serif wordmark with glow or botanical linework. with the full business name.
Icon mark: simplify the Refined serif wordmark with glow or botanical linework. into a square avatar for favicons, socials, and app badges.
Text-only wordmark: keep one clean horizontal version for signatures, invoices, PDFs, and letterhead.
letterhead: Top band uses the primary color, logo lockup, and one short positioning line.
Contact block shows website, support inbox, and one escalation inbox in the footer.
Invoices, proposals, and one-page PDFs keep the display font for headings and the body font for all operational copy.

posting_cadence.label: Commerce cadence
schedule: Prepare 3 daily product or bundle creatives, 1 story sequence, and 1 email slot for approval review.
Batch 5-10 Pinterest pins or catalog visuals per week from the same photo and mockup family.
Keep urgency, shipping windows, and bundle CTA language aligned across all channels.
calendar: Monday: hero product or collection spotlight
Tuesday: detail, texture, or ingredient education
Thursday: gift guide or routine framing
Friday: deadline, cutoff, or drop reminder
Weekend: FAQ, testimonial request, or moodboard refresh

merch_review_scope: Prepare a review-only mockup pack for the first three hero products, bundle insert cards, and one packaging concept.
Keep POD, supplier, and inventory activation blocked until fulfillment proof is evidence-backed.
Match product mockups, packaging accents, and size or routine cards to the same palette and font stack used on the site.
